summary: Iteration 11 - Activity Feed Feature Testing Complete. All backend tests (14/14) and frontend tests passed. The new public /api/activity/feed endpoint returns anonymised recent student activity. Dashboard layout updated to 3-col tools + 1-col feed sidebar.
passed_tests: GET /api/activity/feed returns 200 without auth (public endpoint)
GET /api/activity/feed returns JSON with 'feed' array
Feed returns max 12 items
Each feed item has: message, tool, type, created_at, time_ago
Feed messages are non-empty strings
Feed tool values are valid (brief, checkin, etc.)
time_ago has valid relative time format (e.g., '3h ago', 'just now')
Feed is sorted by most recent first
Feed messages are anonymised - no emails exposed
Feed messages are anonymised - no user IDs exposed
Feed messages use anonymous prefixes ('A student', 'Someone', etc.)
Login endpoint still works (test@simplifii.com / test123)
Notifications endpoint still requires auth (returns 401 without)
Notifications endpoint works with auth
Frontend: Login flow redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Welcome back, Test' message
Frontend: ActivityFeed component visible in right sidebar
Frontend: 'LIVE ACTIVITY' header with green pulsing dot
Frontend: 8 activity items displayed with colored dots and time_ago
Frontend: 9 tool cards in 3-column grid layout
Frontend: Notifications section showing user notifications
Frontend: Stats row showing Tickets, Output Modes, Upload
critical_code_review_comments: Activity feed endpoint correctly uses public access (no auth required)
Anonymisation working - uses random prefixes ('A student', 'Someone', 'A learner', 'A fellow student')
University names included for social proof but no PII exposed
Feed auto-refreshes every 30 seconds on frontend (setInterval in useEffect)
Dashboard layout changed from 4-col to 3-col tools + 1-col feed sidebar - works well
ActivityFeed component has proper loading state with skeleton UI
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from brief_history and checkins collections

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check BYPASSED for owner testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 complete. Activity Feed feature fully tested. Public endpoint /api/activity/feed returns max 12 anonymised items from brief_history and checkins collections. Frontend ActivityFeed component in Dashboard right sidebar with LIVE ACTIVITY header, green pulsing dot, colored dots per tool type, and time_ago display. Auto-refreshes every 30 seconds. All 9 tools still accessible. Cookie-based auth working.
